steps.title: Find the logical relationship
steps.content: Selenium was isolated in the same year it was discovered. Molybdenum was isolated three years after it was discovered. The second sentence therefore contrasts with the first instead of giving a result, example, or similarity.

steps.title: Pick a contrast transition
steps.content: Choice B signals a consequence, but selenium's timeline did not cause molybdenum's. Choice C signals similarity, and Choice D signals an example; neither fits opposing timelines. A contrast transition is needed. The answer is A.
